allow: PowerShell(docker exec pg psql -U postgres -d nexora_erp -c "\\d sistema_configuracao.tenant_feature_flags" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec pg psql -U postgres -d nexora_erp -c "SELECT key, modulo, ativo_por_defeito AS defeito, configuravel AS config FROM saas.feature_catalog ORDER BY modulo, key;" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec pg psql -U postgres -d nexora_erp -c "SELECT id, nome, preco FROM saas.plans ORDER BY id;" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec pg psql -U postgres -d nexora_erp -c "\\d saas.plans" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec pg psql -U postgres -d nexora_erp -c "SELECT id, codigo, nome FROM saas.plans ORDER BY id;" 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker exec pg psql -U postgres -d nexora_erp -c "SELECT p.nome AS plano, COUNT\(pm.modulo\) AS modulos FROM saas.plans p LEFT JOIN saas.plan_modules pm ON pm.plan_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.nome ORDER BY p.id;" 2>&1)
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "nexora|main" -or $_.CommandLine -match "nexora" } | Select-Object Id, Name, CPU | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(docker exec pg psql -U postgres -d nexora_erp -c "SELECT schema_name FROM information_schema.schemata ORDER BY schema_name;" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec pg psql -U postgres -d nexora_erp -c "SELECT tablename FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname='recursos_humanos';" 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker exec pg psql -U postgres -d nexora_erp -c "SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='auth' AND table_name='cargos' ORDER BY ordinal_position;" 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker exec pg psql -U postgres -d nexora_erp -c "SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='rh' AND table_name='cargos' ORDER BY ordinal_position;" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec pg psql -U postgres -d nexora_erp -f /tmp/068_irps_adiantamentos.sql 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec pg psql -U postgres -d nexora_erp -c "DROP SCHEMA recursos_humanos CASCADE;" 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker exec pg psql -U postgres -d nexora_erp -c "SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='rh' AND table_name='horarios_trabalho' ORDER BY ordinal_position;" 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker exec pg psql -U postgres -d nexora_erp -c "SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='rh' AND table_name='tipos_ausencia' ORDER BY ordinal_position;" 2>&1)
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "go|nexora|air" } | Select-Object Id, Name, CPU | Format-Table)
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "nexora|go" } | Select-Object Id, Name | Format-Table)
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "nexora" } | Select-Object Id, Name, CPU)
